title: Portable Context Control Plane — History State Summary Input
description: Schema for the --history CLI input file. A summary of the history state sufficient for selectors to reason about history-sensitive components — without exposing raw turn content. Class B input — if absent or historyMalformed: true: include all history components with riskLevel: high or retainPolicy != optional; emit history_summary_missing warning. Privacy rule: no raw turn content, no raw transcript text, no turn-level prose may appear in this object or in schema examples. Only lane presence flags, counts, and status flags are permitted. Canonical owners: docs/06 §2.6; docs/11 §4.1; docs/12 §3.6.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-2B — Batch B. No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. No docs edited. Privacy rule enforced: no raw turn content in this schema or examples. Canonical sources: docs/06 §2.6, docs/04 §7.6, docs/11 §4.1, docs/12 §3.6.

lanesPresent.title: Lanes present
lanesPresent.description: Which history lanes have at least one turn in the current history state. Each element is a lane name string. Recognized MVP lanes: durable_constraints, durable_facts, open_commitments, recent_raw_turns, working_summary, discardable_noise. An empty array means no history turns exist. Absence of a lane name does not mean the lane is empty — see durableConstraintsPresent and openCommitmentsPresent for safety-critical lane flags.

durableConstraintsPresent.title: Durable constraints present
durableConstraintsPresent.description: Whether the durable_constraints history lane has at least one turn. true = history selector must include all history components associated with durable constraints. Components representing this lane carry retainPolicy: safety_critical or omissionPolicy: never — omission is never permitted regardless of selector evidence.

openCommitmentsPresent.title: Open commitments present
openCommitmentsPresent.description: Whether the open_commitments history lane has at least one turn. true = history selector must include all history components associated with open commitments. Components representing this lane carry retainPolicy: safety_critical or omissionPolicy: never.

recentRawTurnCount.title: Recent raw turn count
recentRawTurnCount.description: Number of turns in the recent_raw_turns lane. Integer >= 0. Used by the history selector to assess recency of conversation context. Does not include raw turn content — count only.

totalHistoryTokensApprox.title: Total history tokens approximate
totalHistoryTokensApprox.description: Approximate total token count across all history turns in all lanes. Integer >= 0. Used by selectors and the Budgeter as an informational budget signal. This is an estimate; the Budgeter uses tokensApprox from component registry entries for actual budget enforcement.

historyMalformed.title: History malformed flag
historyMalformed.description: Whether the History Lane Manager could not classify turns reliably. true = the summary may be incomplete or unreliable — selectors must fail open and include all history components with riskLevel: high or retainPolicy != optional. false = summary was successfully computed and can be trusted for selector decisions. Canonical behavior: docs/06 §2.6 fail-open rule; docs/12 §3.6 Class B fallback.
